title: CoMeT: Collaborative Memory Transformer for Efficient Long Context Modeling
what_happened: arXiv:2602.01766v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The quadratic complexity and indefinitely growing key-value (KV) cache of standard Transformers pose a major barrier to long-context processing. title: QIMMA قِمّة ⛰: A Quality-First Arabic LLM Leaderboard
what_happened: Hugging Face Blog announced 'QIMMA قِمّة ⛰: A Quality-First Arabic LLM Leaderboard', highlighting new developments relevant to AI researchers and practitioners.

title: ChatGPT Images 2.0 is a breakthrough that could fundamentally reshape graphic generation
what_happened: OpenAI is adding reasoning and web search to its ChatGPT Images 2.0 image generator. The model can now create up to eight consistent images from a single prompt and handles text in general, and especially in non-Latin scripts, significantly better. The article ChatGPT Images 2.0 is a breakthrough that could fundamentally reshape graphic generation

title: Google launches Deep Research and Deep Research Max agents to automate complex research
what_happened: Google Deepmind is rolling out Deep Research Max, a new AI agent built on Gemini 3.1 Pro that runs autonomous research across the web and proprietary data sources. title: OpenAI Beefs Up ChatGPT’s Image Generation Model
what_happened: The ChatGPT Images 2.0 model is here. Our testing shows it’s better at creating more detailed images and rendering text, but it still struggles with languages other than English.
